why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound official packet table assigns minecraft:chunks_biomes to packet id 0x0d, and the official ClientboundChunksBiomesPacket(List<ChunkBiomeData>) empty-list fixture encodes a context-free VarInt list-count body through the official STREAM_CODEC. Stevenarella must expose a packet variant, dispatch that official id, decode the official empty-list body, and fully consume the bytes for packet-support evidence.
what: The exact Rust oracle test failed to compile because steven_protocol::protocol::packet::Packet has no PlayChunksBiomesClientbound variant, so Stevenarella cannot currently dispatch the official Play clientbound chunks_biomes packet id/body.

evidence.observed_failure: error[E0599]: no variant or associated item named `PlayChunksBiomesClientbound` found for enum `Packet`
